trap: fontFamily: 'Inter, system-ui, sans-serif' — Inter is the most common AI default
description: Inter is banned for premium/creative work. Use Geist, Outfit, Cabinet Grotesk, or Satoshi

trap: Uses 3 font weights: font-semibold (600), font-bold (700), font-medium (500)
description: 2 font weights for UI: normal (400/500) and bold (600/700). Pick one from each tier, not three

trap: font-semibold (600) paired with font-medium (500) — only 100 weight apart
description: Dramatic weight pairing: 400+700, not 600+500. Weight contrast must be visible

trap: grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 for project cards — the classic AI card grid
description: 3-column equal card grids are banned. Use asymmetric grid, zig-zag, or auto-fit minmax

trap: 'Manage and track all your projects seamlessly in one place' — filler with 'seamlessly'
description: Filler words banned: 'seamlessly', 'elevate', 'unleash', 'next-gen'. Use concrete verbs

trap: 'Learn More' link on project cards — generic, says nothing about the destination
description: Button/link text must be specific verb+noun: 'View details', 'Open project', not 'Learn More'

trap: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) in the hover-card CSS — pure black shadow
description: Never pure black shadows. Tint to background hue: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08) or similar

trap: transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease in CSS and transition-shadow on cards
description: Never transition box-shadow directly. Use pseudo-element opacity technique

trap: Bell and Settings icon buttons have no aria-label
description: Icon buttons must have aria-label for screen reader users

trap: Search input uses placeholder only, no associated <label> or aria-label
description: Form inputs need associated labels for accessibility. Placeholder is not a label

trap: outline-none on search input without :focus-visible ring replacement
description: Never outline-none without a :focus-visible replacement. Keyboard users need visible focus

trap: focus:border-indigo-500 — using border change for focus instead of ring
description: Use focus-visible:ring-2 ring-offset, not border color change, for focus indication

trap: Empty state is just 2 lines of text — no icon, no CTA, no illustration
description: Empty states need: icon/illustration, why it's empty, CTA to take action, help link. This is an onboarding moment

trap: Empty state is text-center with no visual weight — looks like an afterthought
description: Empty states are onboarding opportunities. Needs illustration, clear message, primary CTA button

trap: 'John Doe' in activity feed — the most generic placeholder name
description: Generic names banned. Use creative, realistic names that feel intentional

trap: 'Sarah Chen' — common AI-generated diverse placeholder name
description: AI-typical diverse placeholder names are a tell. Use distinctive, contextual names

trap: Activity feed items wrapped in bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-lg inside an already-bordered section
description: Cards inside a card section — flatten hierarchy with spacing or divide-y, not nested containers

trap: Uses zinc-100, zinc-200, zinc-300, zinc-400, zinc-500, zinc-600 — 6 text shades
description: 2-3 text colors only: primary (dark/light), secondary (grey), tertiary (light grey). 6 shades is noise

trap: emerald-400/500 for status + indigo-400/500/600 for actions — two accent colors
description: Max 1 accent color with saturation < 80%. Status can use semantic color but both shouldn't be saturated

trap: transition-colors duration-200 is fine, but transition-shadow duration-300 triggers box-shadow repaint
description: Animating box-shadow causes expensive repaints. Use pseudo-element opacity technique instead

trap: Progress percentage displayed without font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums
description: Numbers that change (percentages, counts) need tabular-nums so layout doesn't shift

trap: h2 'Your Workspace' heading without text-wrap: balance
description: Headings should use text-wrap: balance to prevent orphans and awkward line breaks

trap: h2 uses text-3xl font-bold — hierarchy through size alone, h3 uses font-semibold only
description: Control hierarchy with weight + color + space, not just font-size scaling

trap: Component only renders populated and empty states — no loading/skeleton state
description: Every data-fetching view needs loading state with skeleton screens matching content layout

trap: No error state handling — what if the project fetch fails?
description: Error states need: what went wrong, why, how to fix, retry button. Never just omit them

trap: border-zinc-800, border-zinc-700 — hardcoded border colors instead of alpha tokens
description: Use semi-transparent borders (border-white/10) that adapt across themes, not hardcoded zinc shades

trap: Section heading 'Your Workspace' uses centered-ish layout with mx-auto
description: With default DESIGN_VARIANCE=8, centered hero/H1 sections are banned. Use left-aligned + asymmetric

trap: Multiple transition-colors and hover animations with no @media (prefers-reduced-motion)
description: Reduced motion support is not optional. Provide @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives

trap: Buttons have hover states but no :active press feedback
description: Active state needs tactile feedback: -translate-y-[1px] or scale-[0.98] to simulate physical press

trap: gap-4 on grid, gap-3 in header, space-y-3 in feed — no deliberate spacing rhythm/scale
description: Define a spacing scale and use it deliberately. Spacing should create rhythm, not be arbitrary

trap: Outer card rounded-xl (12px) contains inner items with rounded-lg (8px) — not concentric
description: Concentric border radius: outer = inner + padding. Same-level elements should share one radius

trap: 'Manage and track all your projects' is ok, but description is directive-style filler
description: Subtitles should describe concrete value, not restate the obvious. Cut redundant copy

trap: Status shown as colored text badge — uses emerald for 'active', looks like traffic light UI
description: Status indicators should be semantic and accessible, not rely on color alone. Add icon or pattern

trap: Search icon inside input is decorative but not marked aria-hidden
description: Decorative icons must have aria-hidden='true' to avoid screen reader noise

trap: ease used in CSS transition: box-shadow 0.3s ease — not a deliberate easing curve
description: Don't use generic 'ease'. Use specific curves: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for ease-out-expo
